_comment: VEMO enforcement hooks for Claude Code. Registered into .claude/settings.json by enforcement/install.sh (idempotent — re-running dedupes). One pure-Python dispatcher (run.py) handles every guard: single source of truth, Windows-friendly, honors enforcement.mode/block_on/fail_closed + observability.telemetry. $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR makes the commands CWD-independent (a session started in a subdirectory still finds the dispatcher); the '.' fallback covers harnesses that do not set it. Exit 2 = block the action and feed stderr back to the agent.

PreToolUse._comment: run-budget stop rule — counts every tool call; hard-stops a runaway only when auto mode is ON
